title: Falltower
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:LtFalltower.jpg]] |name=Falltower |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[Star Wars (1977) 58|''Star Wars'' (1977) 58]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Are you positive the shuttle can get us through, Princess?"
"No problem, Lt. Falltower. Its shields aren't as heavy as those on this station—but they were designed to pass through the corona and back before requiring recharging."
"That's good to hear.|Falltower and Leia Organa|}} [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Falltower''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Falltower was posted to [[Haven Base]] on [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]] when the Alliance ran a novel experiment of concealing its [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|fleet]] within the chromosphere of the [[Star/Legends|star]], [[Arbran]], by way of five [[Kerts-Bhrg field generator|Kerts-Bhrg generators]]. Falltower was present with the fleet when the protective field was activated, and afterward he was among the retinue that accompanied [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] through the star and back to the base. ==Behind the scenes== Falltower appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 58|''Star Wars'' 58]], written by [[David Michelinie]], illustrated by [[Walter Simonson]] and released in [[1982]]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 58|''Star Wars'' (1977) 58]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 58}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Alliance Military officers]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
